x-enumeration-literals.name: Initiated
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The clearing process has started; the payment instruction has been received but not yet validated.

Comment:
Example: A customer submits an ACH transfer; the bank records it but has not yet checked the details.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Validating
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payment is undergoing validation checks such as format, compliance, and funds verification.

Comment:
Example: The system verifies that the IBAN is correct, the customer has sufficient balance, and no sanctions apply.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Matched
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payment details are successfully matched between sending and receiving institutions or internal systems. Ready for obligation calculation.

Comment:
Example: A batch of SEPA payments has been reconciled with the receiving banks records.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Netting
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Obligations are being calculated and offset among institutions (applies to batch clearing systems).

Comment:
Example: At the end of a day, multiple bank-to-bank payments are netted so only the net positions are settled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cleared
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing process completed successfully; the payment is ready for settlement.

Comment:
Example: Funds from a wire transfer have been confirmed by all parties and are queued for final settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: In Progress
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The clearing process is actively being processed; an intermediate state.

Comment:
Example: A cross-border payment is being transmitted through correspondent banks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Failed
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing could not be completed due to errors or issues.

Comment:
Example: Payment failed because the beneficiary account number was invalid or a technical error occurred in the system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing explicitly refused, typically due to invalid data or regulatory constraints.

Comment:
Example: A payment is rejected because the account is closed or the transaction violates anti-money laundering rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing process stopped before completion, either by the sender or the bank.

Comment:
Example: A customer cancels a scheduled payment before the bank validates it.

x-enumeration-literals.name: On Hold
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Temporarily paused for investigation or manual review.

Comment:
Example: A large payment flagged by compliance for further verification before proceeding.
